backingDescription: TRU is not verified as a directly reserve-backed token or a tokenized fund share. It is best classified as a legacy protocol/governance token associated with TrueFi's historical uncollateralized lending and private-credit markets. Underlying credit exposure, if any, should be researched at the pool/vault level rather than assumed for TRU itself.

_meta.notes: No public reserve report, proof-of-reserves oracle, custodian report, or collateralization ratio was verified for TRU. Do not treat protocol TVL or active loans as TRU reserves.
